  • Overview
  • Package

  • Index
  • Help

Uses of Annotation Interface
org.moeaframework.core.configuration.Property

Packages that use Property
Package
Description
org.moeaframework.algorithm
Implementations of various algorithms and support tools for working with algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation
Extends an algorithm with "continuations" or "restarts", where we periodically reseed an algorithm with random solutions and optionally adjust the settings.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso
Implementations of various Particle Swarm Optimization (PSO) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa
Implementations of various simulated annealing (SA) algorithms.
org.moeaframework.algorithm.single
Implementations of various single-objective optimization algorithms.
org.moeaframework.core.operator
Package of various mutation and crossover operators.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.binary
Collection of operators for binary-encoded variables.
org.moeaframework.core.operator.grammar
Collection of operators for grammars for use with Grammatical Evolution (GE).
org.moeaframework.core.operator.program
Collection of operators for expression trees for use with Genetic Programming (GP).
org.moeaframework.core.operator.real
Collection of operators for real-encoded variables.

  • Uses of Property in org.moeaframework.algorithm

    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm with annotations of type Property
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    RVEA.setAdaptFrequency(int adaptFrequency)
    Sets the frequency, in generations, that the reference vectors are normalized.
    void
    CMAES.setCc(double cc)
    Sets the cumulation parameter.
    void
    CMAES.setCcov(double ccov)
    Sets the learning rate.
    void
    CMAES.setCcovsep(double ccovsep)
    Sets the learning rate when diagonal mode is active.
    void
    CMAES.setCheckConsistency(boolean checkConsistency)
    Enables or disables consistency checks to ensure CMA-ES remains numerically stable.
    void
    CMAES.setCs(double cs)
    Sets the step size of the cumulation parameter.
    void
    CMAES.setDamps(double damps)
    Sets the damping for step size.
    void
    MOEAD.setDelta(double delta)
    Sets the probability of mating with a solution in the neighborhood rather than the entire population.
    void
    CMAES.setDiagonalIterations(int diagonalIterations)
    Sets the number of iterations in which only the covariance diagonal is used.
    void
    MOEAD.setEta(double eta)
    Sets the maximum number of population slots a solution can replace.
    void
    AGEMOEAII.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    EpsilonMOEA.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    GDE3.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    IBEA.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    MOEAD.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
    Sets the initial population size.
    void
    MSOPS.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    NSGAII.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    PESA2.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    RVEA.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    SMSEMOA.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    SPEA2.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    VEGA.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    SPEA2.StrengthFitnessEvaluator.setK(int k)
    Sets the value k that controls which nearest neighbor is used to compute the crowding distance.
    void
    CMAES.setLambda(int lambda)
    Sets the number of offspring generated each iteration.
    void
    MOEAD.setNeighborhoodSize(int neighborhoodSize)
    Sets the size of the neighborhood used for mating, which must be at least variation.getArity()-1.
    void
    SPEA2.setNumberOfOffspring(int numberOfOffspring)
    Sets the number of offspring produced each iteration.
    void
    RandomSearch.setSampleSize(int sampleSize)
    Sets the number of solutions sampled each iteration.
    void
    CMAES.setSigma(double sigma)
    Sets the overall standard deviation.
    void
    MOEAD.setUpdateUtility(int updateUtility)
    Sets the frequency, in generations, in which utility values are updated; set to 50 to use the recommended update frequency or -1 to disable utility-based search.
    void
    AGEMOEAII.setVariation(Variation variation)
     
    void
    DBEA.setVariation(Variation variation)
     
    void
    EpsilonMOEA.setVariation(Variation variation)
     
    void
    GDE3.setVariation(DifferentialEvolutionVariation variation)
    Replaces the differential evolution variation operator to be used by this algorithm.
    void
    IBEA.setVariation(Variation variation)
     
    void
    MOEAD.setVariation(Variation variation)
    Sets the variation operator.
    void
    MSOPS.setVariation(DifferentialEvolutionVariation variation)
    Replaces the differential evolution variation operator to be used by this algorithm.
    void
    NSGAII.setVariation(Variation variation)
     
    void
    PAES.setVariation(Mutation mutation)
    Replaces the mutation operator to be used by this algorithm.
    void
    PESA2.setVariation(Variation variation)
     
    void
    RVEA.setVariation(Variation variation)
     
    void
    SMSEMOA.setVariation(Variation variation)
     
    void
    SPEA2.setVariation(Variation variation)
     
    void
    VEGA.setVariation(Variation variation)
     

  • Uses of Property in org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation

    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm.continuation with annotations of type Property
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation.setInjectionRate(double injectionRate)
    Deprecated.
    Sets the percentage of the population that, during a restart, are introduced into the new population.
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension.setInjectionRate(double injectionRate)
    Sets the percentage of the population that, during a restart, are introduced into the new population.
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation.setMaximumPopulationSize(int maximumPopulationSize)
    Deprecated.
    Sets the maximum size of the population.
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension.setMaximumPopulationSize(int maximumPopulationSize)
    Sets the maximum size of the population.
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation.setMaxWindowSize(int maxWindowSize)
    Deprecated.
    Sets the maximum number of iterations allowed since the last restart before forcing a restart.
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension.setMaxWindowSize(int maxWindowSize)
    Sets the maximum number of iterations allowed since the last restart before forcing a restart.
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation.setMinimumPopulationSize(int minimumPopulationSize)
    Deprecated.
    Sets the minimum size of the population.
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension.setMinimumPopulationSize(int minimumPopulationSize)
    Sets the minimum size of the population.
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuation.setWindowSize(int windowSize)
    Deprecated.
    Sets the number of iterations between invocations of check.
    void
    AdaptiveTimeContinuationExtension.setWindowSize(int windowSize)
    Sets the number of iterations between invocations of check.

  • Uses of Property in org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso

    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm.pso with annotations of type Property
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    AbstractPSOAlgorithm.setLeaderSize(int leaderSize)
    Sets the number of leaders, which tracks the best particles according to some fitness criteria.
    void
    OMOPSO.setMutationProbability(double mutationProbability)
    Sets the mutation probability used by the uniform and non-uniform mutation operators.
    void
    OMOPSO.setPerturbationIndex(double perturbationIndex)
    Sets the perturbation index used by uniform and non-uniform mutation.
    void
    AbstractPSOAlgorithm.setSwarmSize(int swarmSize)
    Sets the number of particles (aka swarm size or population size).

  • Uses of Property in org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa

    Methods in org.moeaframework.algorithm.sa with annotations of type Property
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    GeometricCoolingSchedule.setAlpha(double alpha)
    Sets the cooling rate.
    void
    AMOSA.setGamma(double gamma)
    Sets the value of gamma, which determines the number of random solutions generated to fill the initial population.
    void
    AMOSA.setHardLimit(int hardLimit)
    Sets the hard limit, which controls the maximum size of the archive or result set at termination.
    void
    AbstractSimulatedAnnealingAlgorithm.setInitialTemperature(double initialTemperature)
    Sets the initial, or maximum, temperature.
    void
    AbstractSimulatedAnnealingAlgorithm.setMutation(Mutation mutation)
    Sets the mutation operator.
    void
    AMOSA.setNumberOfHillClimbingIterationsForRefinement(int numberOfHillClimbingIterationsForRefinement)
    Sets the number of hill climbing iterations to refine initial solutions.
    void
    AMOSA.setNumberOfIterationsPerTemperature(int numberOfIterationsPerTemperature)
    Sets the number of iterations performed at each temperature.
    void
    AMOSA.setSoftLimit(int softLimit)
    Sets the soft limit, which controls the maximum size that the archive can be filled before clustering is used to reduce the size to the hard limit.
    void
    TemperatureBasedTerminationCondition.setStoppingTemperature(double stoppingTemperature)
    Sets the stopping, or minimum, temperature at which point the algorithm stops.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    SingleObjectiveEvolutionaryAlgorithm.setInitialPopulationSize(int initialPopulationSize)
     
    void
    SimulatedAnnealing.setNumberOfIterationsPerTemperature(int numberOfIterationsPerTemperature)
    Sets the number of iterations performed at each temperature.
    void
    EvolutionStrategy.setVariation(SelfAdaptiveNormalVariation variation)
    Replaces the variation operator to be used by this algorithm.
    void
    GeneticAlgorithm.setVariation(Variation variation)
     

  • Uses of Property in org.moeaframework.core.operator

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.operator with annotations of type Property
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    OnePointCrossover.setProbability(double probability)
    Sets the probability of applying this operator to solutions.
    void
    TwoPointCrossover.setProbability(double probability)
    Sets the probability of applying this operator to solutions.
    void
    TypeSafeCrossover.setProbability(double probability)
    Sets the probability of applying this operator to each decision variable.
    void
    TypeSafeMutation.setProbability(double probability)
    Sets the probability of mutating each decision variable.
    void
    UniformCrossover.setProbability(double probability)
    Sets the probability of applying this operator to solutions.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    BitFlip.setProbability(double probability)
    Sets the probability of flipping a bit.

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.operator.grammar with annotations of type Property
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    GrammarMutation.setProbability(double probability)
    Sets the probability of mutating each integer codon in the grammar representation.

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    PointMutation.setProbability(double probability)
    Sets the probability of mutating a node in the tree.

  • Uses of Property in org.moeaframework.core.operator.real

    Methods in org.moeaframework.core.operator.real with annotations of type Property
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    void
    DifferentialEvolutionVariation.setCrossoverRate(double crossoverRate)
    Sets the crossover rate of this differential evolution operator.
    void
    PM.setDistributionIndex(double distributionIndex)
    Sets the distribution index controlling the shape of the polynomial mutation.
    void
    SBX.setDistributionIndex(double distributionIndex)
    Sets the distribution index of this SBX operator.
    void
    SPX.setEpsilon(double epsilon)
    Sets the expansion rate of this operator.
    void
    PCX.setEta(double eta)
    Sets the standard deviation of the normal distribution controlling the spread of solutions in the direction of the selected parent.
    void
    UNDX.setEta(double eta)
    Sets the standard deviation of the normal distribution controlling the spread of solutions in the remaining orthogonal directions not defined by the parents.
    void
    AdaptiveMetropolis.setJumpRateCoefficient(double jumpRateCoefficient)
    Sets the jump rate coefficient, controlling the standard deviation of the covariance matrix.
    void
    MultiParentVariation.setNumberOfOffspring(int numberOfOffspring)
    Sets the number of offspring produced by this operator.
    void
    MultiParentVariation.setNumberOfParents(int numberOfParents)
    Sets the number of parents required by this operator.
    void
    SBX.setProbability(double probability)
    Sets the probability of applying this SBX operator to each variable.
    void
    DifferentialEvolutionVariation.setScalingFactor(double scalingFactor)
    Sets the scaling factor of this differential evolution operator.
    void
    SBX.setSwap(boolean swap)
    Sets whether this SBX operator swaps variables between the two parents.
    void
    SBX.setSymmetric(boolean symmetric)
    Sets if offspring are distributed symmetrically or asymmetrically.
    void
    PCX.setZeta(double zeta)
    Sets the standard deviation of the normal distribution controlling the spread of solutions in the directions defined by the remaining parents.
    void
    UNDX.setZeta(double zeta)
    Sets the standard deviation of the normal distribution controlling the spread of solutions in the orthogonal directions defined by the parents.
